emails.subject: RE: Deal Bench and EnronOnline
emails.body: I like this plan. Clearly it has organizational implications that will need to be addressed. Specifically, as I understand it, DealBench goes away. Most of the marketing folks can be directly deployed on marketing of EOL auctions, but we will have to find a home for some of the support staff. Also, we will have to redeploy some of the IT staff. Hopefully, we can find a way to do some of the integration/engineering effort of creating the EOL auctions engine in parallel with our other initiatives. I'll begin discussing that with Mike when you give me the go-ahead. --jay

emails.subject: RE: Deal Bench and EnronOnline
emails.body: RE: Deal Bench and EnronOnline I talked with Greg and he and bibi are for it. Start the process with Guadaramma but keep it close to the vest as it is not official with the DealBench folks.
